chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5537 of 2019 Barkat Ali Versus Printing Corporation of Pakistan (Pvt.) Ltd. & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. No.19711/23 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For hearing of Misc. No.24489/19 4. For hearing of main case. Dated: 05.05.2025 None present for the petitioner. -.-.- This is an old case of 2019, which is over six years old. None is present for the petitioner without intimation. Perhaps this is because the petitioner has filed a withdrawal application, which is fixed at Sr. No.1. As such, this petition is dismissed as withdrawn along with listed applications. Head of Const. Benches Judge
